headline: B of A Securities Downgrades Mohawk Industries to Neutral, Lowers Price Target to $122
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Rafe Jadrosich   downgrades Mohawk Industries (NYSE:MHK) from Buy to Neutral and lowers the price target from $149 to $122.
